description: A research librarian has noticed inconsistent author names in the library. Standardize the author names for the following researchers across their specified papers: For Alan Turing, normalize the author of 'On Computable Numbers...' and 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' to First Name: 'Alan M.', Last Name: 'Turing'. For Claude Shannon, normalize 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' and 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' to First Name: 'Claude E.', Last Name: 'Shannon'. For Geoffrey Hinton, normalize 'ImageNet Classification...' to First Name: 'Geoffrey E.', Last Name: 'Hinton'. Ensure the names are identical across the specified papers.
